## What section does this PR touch?

- Section: `section-name/`
- Type of change: [ ] new Dump entry [ ] Graveyard move [ ] Recommended pick change [ ] new section [ ] fix typo / link

## For Dump additions

- Link to the project/paper:
- One-line verdict (what it's good at, what it's bad at):
- Why it belongs in this section:

## For Recommended pick changes

If you're changing a top-3 pick, answer:

- Which pick is being replaced?
- Why is the current pick wrong? (Specific failure mode, not "outdated.")
- Why is the new pick better? (Measurement or clear qualitative argument.)
- What's the "when to avoid" clause for the new pick?

## For Graveyard moves

- What's being retired?
- Why?
- What replaced it?

## Checklist

- [ ] I added a one-line honest verdict, not a marketing blurb.
- [ ] If this is a Recommended change, I included a *when to avoid* clause.
- [ ] I updated the "Last reviewed" date on the section page.
- [ ] I didn't add emoji icons.
